note: 5 complete SD-JWT VC compact serializations vendored verbatim from the OAuth WG 'SD-JWT-based Verifiable Credentials' (SD-JWT VC) editor's copy examples appendix. All 5 use ES256 issuer signatures (EdDSA-only in proofbundle.sdjwt.verify_sd_jwt), so only the STRUCTURAL verify path (disclosure-digest commitment, recursive disclosure resolution) and proofbundle.sdjwt_vc.check_vc_profile() are exercised here -- issuer signature verification is honestly out of scope and documented as such, never silently skipped-as-pass.

files.note: line 0/1/2 are three presentations of the same 'https://credentials.example.com/identity_credential' example credential (9, 2 and 2 disclosures resp., non-recursive); line 3/4 are two presentations of a second, recursive-disclosure example credential ('urn:example:eudi:pid:aendgard:1', 28 and 3 disclosures resp.) -- all 5 independently confirmed structure_ok=True via proofbundle.sdjwt.verify_sd_jwt() before vendoring. Finding 20 (2026-07-15): all 5 are ES256-signed; issuer signature verification is no longer out of scope, see sdjwtvc_issuer_pubkey.json below.

files.source_url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/oauth-wg/oauth-sd-jwt-vc/ccc9724e57460f56e08e6cabdbd3c530c857e50a/examples/settings.yml (key_settings.issuer_key; x/y extracted, private component 'd' intentionally not vendored -- not needed for verification)
files.note: Finding 20 / issue #27: the ES256 issuer public key sdjwtvc_examples.txt's 5 examples are signed under, from the SAME pinned commit's examples/settings.yml (shared by both examples/01, examples/02 and examples/03-pid's specification.yml, which declare no per-example override). Independently re-verified before vendoring: all 5 examples' issuer signatures cryptographically verify under this exact key via proofbundle.sdjwt.verify_sd_jwt (tests/test_sdjwtvc_external_vectors.py) -- self-verified, not merely copied. source_settings_yml_sha256 inside the file pins the upstream settings.yml (fetched independently, sha256 5dd7f63579181f26204cb059e81d4de8b8e8809c5d87278cf6faff9752284c19) for future re-verification.
